notes: Cluster E (Stage 1) appearance-options triad. Pins the Material appearance controls added over the existing Options > Appearance page: the officecfg Appearance-group schema (MaterialAccent/MaterialDensity/MaterialReducedMotion + optional MaterialSurfaceStyle), the 'materialtheme' GtkFrame widget ids in appearance.ui, the weld bindings + FillItemSet officecfg commit in appearance.cxx, and the accent scheme-string composition. Apply is the EXISTING restart path (executeRestartDialog / RESTART_REASON_THEME_CHANGE); live token-cache re-key (accent recolor without restart) is Stage 3 and must be ABSENT here (forbidden_live_markers). Density and reduced motion are stored-value-only and honest-inert this stage (metric/motion plumbing is Stage 3). Source evidence only: runtime_verified is false.

scheme_string.note: D's computeMaterialScheme(accent,bDark) composes the accent key as '<accent>' in light and '<accent>-dark' in dark; Violet(0) resolves to the unnamed default / 'dark' scheme so the shipped default stays byte-identical. The accent_order MUST match the MaterialAccent enum order AND the appearance.ui combo items so the three surfaces cannot silently diverge.

apply.note: Stage 1 applies Material appearance through the existing restart dialog. Live token-cache re-key (Stage 3) must be ABSENT from the cui page.
